sections.paragraph:
κατάκαρπος, ον (s. καρπός; Aristodem. [II b.c.]: 383 Fgm. 9 Jac. [in Athen. 11 p. 495f; Leontios, Prooem. p. 2, 16 and 21 of vine and olive tree; LXX; TestSol 17:2 P) very fruitful δένδρα Hs 9, 1, 10.

Aristodem Aristodem , hist. and gramm., II b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

Hs Hs = Similitudes

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 517
